message:
feat(history): Add custom event for real-time sidebar updates

Implements a custom event system so the RecentlyViewedSidebar
automatically refreshes when history changes elsewhere in the app.

Changes:
- client.ts: Dispatch 'jfp:history-update' CustomEvent after trackHistoryView
  and clearHistoryForUser operations
- RecentlyViewedSidebar.tsx: Listen for 'jfp:history-update' events and
  reload history when fired, with proper cleanup on unmount

This eliminates the need to manually refresh the page or rely on polling
to see recently viewed prompts appear in the sidebar.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
